items.briefing:
Australian healthcare organisations should be aware that stolen medical records continue to be highly sought after on cybercrime marketplaces, making patient data a prime target for attackers. Separately, a known vulnerability in Check Point VPN products has been actively exploited since early May — if your organisation uses Check Point VPN, ensure it has been patched promptly.

Law firms are also facing escalating extortion attacks, with criminals threatening to expose sensitive client data unless paid. If your organisation holds confidential client or patient information, now is a good time to review who has access to it and ensure backups are current and secure.

**Tip:** Check with your IT team that any VPN software your organisation uses has received recent security updates.

featured.title: Healthcare data fuels underground cybercrime economy
featured.quote: Stolen Australian healthcare records fuel cybercrime economy, directly threatening hospital security.
